articles.title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Poll heat rises in Palakkad as BJP trains guns on UDF MLA scandal
articles.description: The BJP has fielded Sobha Surendran, who helped the party leap to the second position in the constituency for the first time in 2016, hoping to wrest the seat from the United Democratic Front. The Left Democratic Front has been finishing in third spot in the segment for the past three elections. Neither the UDF nor the LDF has announced candidates for the segment

articles.title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Political crossovers gather pace in Kerala as Assembly elections near
articles.description: Defections and cross-affiliations are blurring the traditional ideological boundaries between the United Democratic Front, Left Democratic Front, and the National Democratic Alliance. Increasingly, electoral pragmatism rather than ideological loyalty appears to be shaping political choices

articles.title: Maharashtra passes Freedom of Religion Bill; CM says not against any community
articles.description: Maharashtra passes Freedom of Religion Bill CM says not against any community

articles.title: Over 250 Killed, 400 Injured In Pakistan Strike On Afghanistan Hospital
articles.description: More than 250 people have been killed and over 400 injured in a Pakistani airstrike at a hospital in Kabul, local media Tolo News reported.

articles.title: BJP's Sanjay Bhatia, Congress' Karamvir Boudh claim Rajya Sabha wins in Haryana
articles.description: BJPs Sanjay Bhatia Congress Karamvir Boudh claim Rajya Sabha wins in Haryana

articles.title: Jensen just put Nvidia’s Blackwell and Vera Rubin sales projections into the $1 trillion stratosphere
articles.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said he expects $1 trillion worth of orders for the chips.

topStories.title: ‘Fourth world nation’: Trump slams Somalia, Ilhan Omar
topStories.description: Speaking at the Oval office, US President Donald Trump stated that Somalia is a “fourth world nation.”

topStories.title: All five NDA candidates win Rajya Sabha polls in Bihar, including CM Nitish Kumar and Nitin Nabin
topStories.description: Three MLAs of Congress party and one MLA of Rashtriya Janata Dal (RJD) skipped the voting. RJD MLA Kumar Sarvjeet alleged that BJP used the money power to win the election.

topStories.title: Around 200 US Troops Injured In 7 Countries During Iran War
topStories.description: Around 200 US military personnel have been Injured in seven countries across the Middle East since the start of the US-Israel war against Iran, a US military spokesman said Monday.

topStories.title: Who is answering Trump’s call for help with Strait of Hormuz?
topStories.description: Trump has criticised the response to his call to help protect shipping in the Strait of Hormuz during the war on Iran.

topStories.title: US court halts Kennedy’s plan to reduce childhood vaccinations citing public health risks
topStories.description: US District Judge of Boston ruled in favor of the American Academy of Pediatrics and other medical groups, which argued that Kennedy’s policies would lower vaccination rates and jeopardize public health.

topStories.title: Cuba electric grid collapses amid US oil blockade causing national blackout
topStories.description: Cuba has not received oil shipments since early January amid US pressure, worsening humanitarian crisis on the island.

topStories.title: BBC files motion asking US court to throw out Trump’s $10bn lawsuit
topStories.description: US president sued BBC over 'Trump: A Second Chance?', seeking $5bn for defamation, $5bn for unfair trade practices.

topStories.title: US-Israel, Iran conflict: First direct contact between Washington & Tehran takes place since 28 February, says report
topStories.description: US envoy Steve Witkoff and Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi have reportedly reestablished direct communication in recent days. Meanwhile, Trump said he is unsure whether Iran's new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, is still alive.

topStories.title: How big of a problem is the Strait of Hormuz for Donald Trump?
topStories.description: US president frustrated with unenthusiastic response after appealing for help wresting control of key strait from Iran.

topStories.title: Haryana Rajya Sabha poll: Counting delayed; Congress writes to ECI alleging ‘attempt at interference’
topStories.description: For Haryana’s two vacant Rajya Sabha seats, three candidates are in the fray

topStories.title: US stocks rebound on AI optimism revival; Dow rises 387 pts, Nasdaq, S&P 1%
topStories.description: Wall Street surged Monday, led by AI-related stocks like Meta and Nvidia, as Meta announced significant layoffs and Nvidia unveiled new components. Oil prices dipped amid easing Middle East conflict concerns, offering market relief. The Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq all closed higher, reflecting positive investor sentiment.

topStories.title: ‘Hope peace restores’: Maharashtra Congress president meets Consul General of Iran
topStories.description: Mr. Sapkal further said that he expressed condolences over the demise of Iran’s Supreme Leader Ali Hosseini Khamenei

dailyNews.title: In Haryana, BJP and Congress gain inroads into each other’s bastions
dailyNews.description: Both the national parties, while tightening their hold, are keen to look beyond

dailyNews.title: Iran, US Have Been In Direct Contact In Recent Days: Reports
dailyNews.description: A direct communications channel between US envoy Steve Witkoff and Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has been reactivated in recent days, Axios reported on Monday, citing a US official and a...

dailyNews.title: Congress sees BJP leader’s bid to trigger polarisation
dailyNews.description: BJP MP from Aligarh, Satish Gautam, had claimed that Muslims were taking the most advantage of welfare schemes

dailyNews.title: Trump Seeks To Reopen Strait Of Hormuz Amid Iran War
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump said he has demanded about seven countries send warships to keep the Strait of Hormuz open as Iranian strikes kept slamming into Gulf countries Monday.

dailyNews.title: Trump pushes allies again to secure Strait of Hormuz — But warns: ‘we don’t need anybody’
dailyNews.description: While France may offer support, key allies such as Germany, Italy, Spain, Japan, and Australia have ruled out military involvement, and the UK is considering limited participation without entering a wider conflict.

dailyNews.title: RJD Rank And File Turns Against Congress After Rajya Sabha Poll Defeat
dailyNews.description: Rajya Sabha election for one seat in Bihar led to a victory for the NDA after three Congress MLAs and their colleague from the Rashtriya Janata Dal skipped the voting.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Hormuz Strait help ‘on the way’ as allies reject military action
dailyNews.description: US president refuses to identify which countries he says are responding to call for naval coalition to open trade route.

dailyNews.title: ‘We don’t even know their leaders’: Trump shrugs at Iran deal talk
dailyNews.description: Speaking at the White House, Donald Trump said Washington does not know who it would negotiate with in Iran, suggesting several leadership layers had been targeted in US strikes.

dailyNews.title: NDA wins eight Rajya Sabha seats from Bihar, Odisha; Haryana results on hold
dailyNews.description: BJP national president Nitin Nabin and Bihar CM Nitish Kumar romp home as NDA secures all five Rajya Sabha seats in Bihar; the party also secures victory of three candidates in Odisha; BJP and the Congress file separate plaints in Haryana

dailyNews.title: Dubai airport suspends landing permission for flights till further notice, says IndiGo amid US-Israel, Iran conflict
dailyNews.description: Dubai International airport has suspended landing permissions for aircraft after missile and drone strikes on Monday amid the US-Israel, Iran conflict, affecting flight operations and causing a blaze at an oil facility. IndiGo advised travelers to check flight statuses for updates.

dailyNews.title: Outrage as Afghan asylum seeker who fought alongside US dies in ICE custody
dailyNews.description: Family, advocates call for full probe after Mohommad Nazeer Paktyawal dies less than 24 hours after being detained.

dailyNews.title: Trump Pushes For 'Enthusiasm' From US Allies To Secure Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump criticized US allies on Monday for their lukewarm response to his call to help protect shipping in the Strait of Hormuz during the US war against Iran.

dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump criticized US allies on Monday for their lukewarm response to his call to help protect shipping in the Strait of Hormuz during the US war against Iran.

dailyNews.title: Wary allies show there's no quick fix to Trump's Iran crisis
dailyNews.description: European leaders are hesitant to help Trump secure the Strait of Hormuz, but they know inaction on the Iran war is not really an option.

dailyNews.title: Trump says White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles diagnosed with early-stage breast cancer
dailyNews.description: According to Trump, Wiles has assembled a strong medical team and her outlook remains positive. He said doctors expect a good recovery.

dailyNews.title: Trump laughs aloud after intel briefing claims Iran’s new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei may be gay: Report
dailyNews.description: As political tensions continue, the allegations surrounding Mojtaba Khamenei’s personal life remain unverified publicly and largely confined to intelligence assessments, according to a report.

dailyNews.title: US forces obliterated Iran, its air force and navy completely destroyed: Trump
dailyNews.description: US forces obliterated Iran its air force and navy completely destroyed Trump

dailyNews.title: Shopify is preparing for AI shopping agents to change everything, exec says
dailyNews.description: Shopify is preparing for an e-commerce transformation via AI shopping agents, says president Harley Finkelstein.

dailyNews.title: Trump lawyer in Jack Smith case draws conservative backing after DOJ praise rattles 'elite' legal conference
dailyNews.description: John Lauro told a conference that the DOJ was "in a better place" under Trump, prompting criticism from conference attendees.

dailyNews.title: Bessent pushes back on CNBC reporter over Trump’s Russian oil strategy
dailyNews.description: Scott Bessent challenged CNBC’s framing of global oil shortages, arguing markets remain supplied despite disruptions tied to the Iran conflict.

dailyNews.title: Jerry O’Connell claims wife, daughters ‘became physical’ after his comments about Harris losing to Trump
dailyNews.description: Actor Jerry O'Connell told a story about his wife Rebecca Romijn after former Vice President Kamala Harris lost the 2024 election on Bill Maher's podcast.

dailyNews.title: Trump Kennedy Center's board votes unanimously to approve $257M renovations and two-year closure
dailyNews.description: Trump Kennedy Center board voted to shut down the performing arts venue for a 2-year renovation despite critics arguing the $257 million project lacks proper congressional oversight.

dailyNews.title: Reporter's Notebook: GOP weighs 'nuking' filibuster to pass Trump's SAVE Act
dailyNews.description: Senate Republicans face an uphill battle in passing Trump's SAVE America Act requiring citizenship proof for voting as Democrats threaten to use filibuster.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court to hear Trump challenge to protected status for Syrian, Haitian nationals in US
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court will review Trump's effort to unwind legal protections for migrants from Haiti and Syria, and will hear arguments in the case next month.

dailyNews.title: Greg Bovino, face of Trump’s mass deportation campaign, to retire after controversial Minneapolis raids
dailyNews.description: U.S. Border Patrol commander Greg Bovino, the face of President Trump’s mass deportation surge, will retire after fatal shootings and controversy in Minneapolis.
